title: Cumulative-patch consolidator (4 historical patch packs merged)
public_claim: Cumulative-patch consolidator (4 historical patch packs merged) is a preserved project packet for the differentiator is stated plainly in HOW_TO_USE.md: this package is the cumulative-patch consolidator that assembles a single ready-to-apply tree from four historically sequenced patch packs (Phase I RC — Tranche 1 — Tranche 2) plus the admitted governed-admission files.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Cumulative-patch consolidator (4 historical patch packs merged), so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
